title: memecylon clavistaminum
intro: Memecylon clavistaminum, also known as the "Kadukkai" or "Gamboge tree," is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka, India, and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant's bark and resin are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Memecylon clavistaminum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's resin is used to prepare herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
